name: 10 MG Bac lofen Tablets IP
about: 10 MG Baclofen Tablets IP is a general medicine that is used to treat muscle spasms, stiffness and pain caused by multiple sclerosis and other spinal cord injuries or diseases. These tablets come in a physical form of tablets and have a dosage of 10 mg. The medicine is to be taken as per the doctors suggestion. It is originated from India and is a high-quality product that is supplied, exported and traded by our company. These tablets should be stored in a cool and dry place.
